# Copilot Instructions for `fjelltur-ai`

## Repository status

This repository is currently at its initial commit. The only tracked project file is `.gitattributes`; there are no source directories, dependency manifests, CI workflows, or existing project docs yet.

Future Copilot sessions should confirm the technology stack and available tooling from the repository contents before suggesting framework-specific commands or code patterns.

## Build, test, and lint

No build, test, or lint commands are configured in the current repository state.

Before proposing commands, first look for newly added manifests or config files such as `package.json`, `pyproject.toml`, `go.mod`, `Cargo.toml`, `.csproj`, `Makefile`, or test runner configs.

## High-level architecture

There is no application architecture in the repository yet. Treat the codebase as a greenfield setup until source code, infrastructure definitions, or project documentation are added.

## Key conventions

Committed text files are normalized through Git attributes:

- `.gitattributes` sets `* text=auto`

Preserve that convention when editing or adding text-based files.
